whatsapp.inboxStale: Showing your last view — reconnect to update
whatsapp.inboxEmpty: No chats yet. This inbox fills up as customers message your shop on WhatsApp.
whatsapp.threadEmpty: No messages in this chat yet.
whatsapp.offlineSend: You're offline — this will send when you're back online.
whatsapp.windowOpen: You can reply now. Free replies until {time} today.
whatsapp.windowClosed: This chat is resting. Your customer needs to message you first before you can reply.
whatsapp.errWindowClosed: This chat is resting. Your customer needs to message you first before you can reply.
whatsapp.errConsentDenied: We can't message this customer yet — they haven't agreed to messages.
whatsapp.errChannelDisabled: WhatsApp sending isn't switched on for your shop yet.
whatsapp.errTemplateInvalid: That update isn't ready to send yet.
whatsapp.errSendFailed: That message didn't send. Try again.
whatsapp.autoRepliesNonAi: These are your own simple, set replies — not a robot or AI. They send the exact words you type, only when a message matches.
whatsapp.autoRepliesStaffReadOnly: Only your account owner can set up automatic replies. Contact your account owner to change these.
